positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system; structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
protocol-based appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction + digestion/gut-comfort support
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
6 to 10 kg weight loss in 30 days when protocol is followed
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating, low energy, or slow progress
relevant for PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS, menopause-related weight gain (not a cure claim)
protocol_morning: zero-calorie drinks (tea, coffee, lemon water) allowed
protocol_night: OK Powder + OK Tablet 15 minutes before bed
fasting_rules: zero-calorie drinks allowed during fasting window
eat only when true hunger is felt
mechanism_allowed_claims: helps you feel full for longer
can support more stable daily energy
can make a simpler routine easier to follow
appetite regulation + eating behavior correction + digestion support
safety_internal_handling: first 3 days can be adjustment phase
guarantee: if weight-loss start is not observed in first 7 days, refund applies when protocol + daily tracker conditions are met
continuation: after each 30 days keep 7 to 10 day break
maintenance: BMR-based intake (1200-1400 kcal female, 1400-1600 kcal male)
macro order: protein -> fiber -> fats -> carbs
proof_points: founder Dr. Arun Tyagi (34 years experience, BAMS, M.D.)
messaging_guardrails: not for users below 18 years old
